overall_rationale: These three paths are reasonable ways to satisfy the user goal. Path 1 uses high-scoring geolocation and mapping APIs, while Path 2 uses a different set of high-scoring APIs for similar tasks. Path 3 takes a more conservative approach using lower-scoring but still suitable APIs.
